name: C21 Investments Inc.
summary: C21 Investments Inc., an integrated cannabis company, cultivates, processes, and distributes cannabis and hemp-derived consumer products in the United States. The company was formerly known as Curlew Lake Resources Inc. and changed its name to C21 Investments Inc. in November 2017. C21 Investments Inc. was incorporated in 1987 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
